title: Level 1 (Fundamental Defense)
scope: Starter Apps and Low Risk Internal Systems
summary: ASVS Level 1 is dedicated to basic defense. It includes a first layer of protection against absolute attacks (such as Injection or Broken Auth) that are relatively easy to find by automated analysis tools (DAST/SAST) without deep modification.
contains: Coverage of the Majority of Automated Testing

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Level 1 (Fundamental Defense)'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Level 1 (Fundamental Defense)'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Level 1 (Fundamental Defense)'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Level 2 (Standard Enterprise)
scope: B to B Commercial Software and Typical Sensitive Processing
summary: The standard (default) security level that the majority of today's enterprise applications must strive for. It contains ~70% of the ASVS control cumulation and relies on manual verification of business logic in addition to automated tools.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Level 2 (Standard Enterprise)'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Level 2 (Enterprise Standard)'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Level 2 (Standard Enterprise)'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Level 3 (High Assurance)
scope: Financial, Medical, Government and Critical Infrastructure Applications
summary: The strictest level of guarantee (Highest Level) for applications that must be explosion-proof or targeted attacks (Targeted Attacks). Requires manual audit review of architectural layers beyond surface testing control.
contains: Verification of Intrinsic Fraud Detection Mechanisms
Super Specific Regulatory Compliance (e.g. PCI-DSS, HIPAA compliance)

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Level 3 (High Assurance)'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Level 3 (High Assurance)'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Level 3 (High Assurance)'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.
